200.description: Retrieves the supplier data associated with the supplier id successfully.

supplierId.description: This is the unique Id that identifies the supplier.

itemsList.description: This si the item Id list that this supplier supplies to the Grocery Store.It can be 1 product or many.

itemId.description: THis is the item Id that supplier sells.

companyName.description: This si the supplier's registered company name.

contactNumber.description: This si the primary contact number of the supplier.

alternateContactNumber.description: This is the laternate contact number and this is optional.

emailId.description: THis is the emailId to officially mail all the agreement and payment details.

deliverySchedule.description: This object holds delivery schedule data during which the seller regularly sends stock to the market

lastRestockedDate.description: This is the last date when the delivery was made by the supplier.

expectedRestockDate.description: THis is the next future date when the delivery is expected to happen.

agreementDetails.description: This is the agreement details object containing the agreement details made with the supplier.

advanceAmountPaid.description: THis is the advance amount paid during the initial agreement.

lastPaymentDate.description: This property holds the last payment date when the supplier was provided with the money for supplying items.

nextPaymentDate.description: THis property keeps track of the next payment date.

lastPaidAmount.description: THis is the last paid amount. Amount paid to seller during last payment date.

expectedPayAmount.description: THis is the due amount to be paid to seller.

schema.description: Error Component standard across all operations.

status.description: This describes the status of the transaction. In the error scenario ddefault value will be 'error'.

errorType.description: This describes the exact error Type. Adds more info on why the transaction failed.

errorMessage.description: This describes the supporting or more descriptive error msg for a particular error type.

details.description: This describes the extra details for finding the root cause.

traceId.description: Unique id for the particular transaction.

reason.description: Additional details that adds to the failure root cause.

itemNo.description: This is the unique identifying number for the whole transaction. This comes in request.This is also optional if the error is related to incoming request parameters, then this will be coming in response.

conflictingField.description: If there are any conflicting fields on that particular transaction and due to which the whole operation failed then this will be coming in response. It is optional field.

schema.title: ErrorResponse

value.errorMessage: Invalid Request: supplier id must follow the format SUPPXXXX
